message:
Add Schema unit tests and close completed epics

- Add 12 unit tests to sqlmodel-schema/src/create.rs covering:
  - Basic CREATE TABLE generation
  - IF NOT EXISTS clause
  - Primary key constraints
  - Unique constraints
  - Foreign key references
  - Auto-increment columns
  - Default values
  - SchemaBuilder index creation
- Fix clippy ignored_unit_patterns warning in connection.rs
- Close beads: sqlmodel_rust-53e (Core Foundation), sqlmodel_rust-t9h (Derive Macros),
  sqlmodel_rust-b0q (PostgreSQL Protocol), sqlmodel_rust-dp9 (Schema & Migrations)
- Close subtasks: 53e.5, 53e.6, t9h.5

All implementations verified complete with passing test suites:
- sqlmodel-core: 44 tests
- sqlmodel-macros: 13 tests
- sqlmodel-postgres: 56 tests
- sqlmodel-query: 58 tests
- sqlmodel-schema: 12 tests (new)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
